prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为18030→20643→18891→23596→19885，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准约19885名，近两年波动幅度约3700名；该校在湖北省物理类招生计划2021年137人、2022年136人、2023年142人、2024年142人、2025年144人，2026年计划162人，较2025年扩招18人（+12.5%），扩招幅度较大，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 江南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年第65名→2026年第52名，学校综合实力和声誉稳步提升；2023年高考周期内有一次偏负面管理事件，但近年声誉平稳；抖音热度排名第71位（一般），短视频曝光量中等，未出现明显报考热度异常信号；轻工技术与工程A+、食品科学与工程A+为全国顶尖学科，与食品科学与工程、生物工程、酿酒工程等招生专业高度关联，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门专业持续高热，而江南大学王牌专业所属的生化环材大类社会热度偏低（明显劝退），可能拉低整体报考热度；湖北省2026年物理类考生约25.1万人，较2025年小幅增加约0.55%，竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次19885名、2026年扩招12.5%（位次下移约1491名）、软科排名持续上升（位次上移约200名）及考生小幅增加等因素；考虑学校层次提升和优势学科吸引力，预计位次较。预测最低位次约21176名，区间20676–21676名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 18030 → 20643 → 18891 → 23596 → 19885, showing an overall fluctuating and declining trend. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 19885, with a fluctuation range of about 3700 in recent two years. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province Physics Category was 137 in 2021, 136 in 2022, 142 in 2023, 142 in 2024, 144 in 2025, and 162 in 2026, an increase of 18 students (+12.5%) compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and easing of competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Jiangnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings has been rising, from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026, showing steady improvement in comprehensive strength and reputation. There was one negative management incident during the 2023 college entrance examination cycle, but reputation has been stable in recent years. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 71st (average), with moderate short video exposure and no obvious abnormal signals in application popularity. Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+) and Food Science and Engineering (A+) are national top-tier disciplines, highly related to enrollment majors such as Food Science and Engineering, Bioengineering, and Brewing Engineering, exerting strong attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly sought after, while the biochemical and environmental engineering categories, where Jiangnan University's flagship majors belong, have low social popularity (clearly discouraged), potentially lowering overall application enthusiasm. The number of Physics Category examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 is about 251,000, a slight increase of about 0.55% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 19885, the 12.5% enrollment expansion in 2026 (ranking drop of about 1491), the continuous rise in Shanghai Ranking (ranking increase of about 200), and the slight increase in examinees, the ranking is expected to be lower. The predicted minimum ranking is about 21176, with a range of 20676–21676.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 20676–21676, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (such as Food Science and Engineering, Bioengineering, etc., which are flagship programs) as the main direction, and treat Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Clinical Medicine) as reach options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (within 20676), you can focus on applying for popular Tier 1 majors. If your ranking is close to the upper bound (21676), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options. Jiangnan University's Food Science and Engineering (A+) is a national top-tier discipline. Although the broader category has low popularity, the discipline's strength is outstanding, and its employment competitiveness is strong.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 3590 → 3731 → 3561 → 5644 → 4070 respectively. In 2024, there was a significant drop (5644th place), and in 2025 it rebounded to 4070th place, with a fluctuation range of about 2000 places. The enrollment plan for this university in Hubei Province for History Category was 21 students in 2021, 22 in 2022, 21 in 2023, 17 in 2024, 18 in 2025, and the plan for 2026 is 19 students, an increase of 1 student (+5.56%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively small expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science ranking has been rising continuously (from 65th in 2021 to 52nd in 2026), with steadily improving comprehensive strength. In recent years, reputation has been stable with no obvious negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 71 (average), with no abnormal signals in application popularity. Light Industry Technology and Engineering (A+), Food Science and Engineering (A+) are science and engineering disciplines, which are not directly related to History Category enrollment majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Finance, Business Administration, Social Work, etc.), and have limited impact on History Category applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Chinese Language/Literature and Law are relatively popular in society, while Teacher Education/Education is divided and wait-and-see, and Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 4070, a small expansion of 5.56% in 2026 (ranking shift down by about 136 places), an increase in Soft Science ranking (ranking shift up by about 30 places), and a slight increase in examinees, considering the improvement in university level and stable popularity of liberal arts majors, the ranking is expected to be relatively stable. The predicted minimum ranking is about 4176, with a range of 3676–4676.
